prompt: A dramatic single-character fantasy illustration of a female East Asian swordswoman general in a dynamic mid-action pose against a pure black background. She is shown from the thighs up, centered and filling most of the frame, with both arms extended wide while wielding two straight swords, one thrust toward the left side of the image and one angled toward the lower right foreground. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, but the rest of the figure is rendered in exquisite detail. She has long dark brown hair tied in a high ponytail with loose strands whipping through the air, secured with an ornate green-and-gold hair ornament. She wears elaborate deep green and antique gold lamellar armor with richly engraved metal plates, layered sleeves, heavy bracers, a sculpted breastplate, dragon-shaped shoulder armor, a decorative waist sash, and flowing fabric ribbons and cloak panels trailing around her. The costume mixes historical Chinese-inspired warrior attire with high-fantasy nobility, covered in intricate filigree, brocade patterns, metallic edging, and embossed details. Use cinematic lighting with bright highlights on the polished blades and armor, strong contrast, crisp edges, and luxurious texture work. The composition should feel like a premium game character key visual or collectible card illustration: elegant, fierce, heroic, highly detailed, semi-realistic anime painting style, black negative space, no scenery, no extra objects, no text, square format.
